title: Spark Proposal - Product update proposals 6, 7, 8
body:
Originating forum post: https://forum.sky.money/t/january-29-2026-proposed-changes/27620

This PR includes the changes from proposals:

- [Ethereum] Spark Liquidity Layer - Upgrade ALM Controller to v1.9.0
- [Ethereum] Spark Liquidity Layer - Onboard Uniswap v4 PYUSD/USDS Pool
- [Ethereum] Spark Liquidity Layer - Onboard Uniswap v4 USDT/USDS Pool

**Do not merge unless associated poll passes**
author: blimpa
